def positive_string_concat_in_loop():
    rule_id = "string_concat_in_loop"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Repeated string concatenation inside loops can create O(n^2) growth and extra allocations."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
